id.description: The unique ID for the chat session.

label.description: The title or subject line summarized for the session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the session was last updated.

chat_message.title: Chat Message
chat_message.description: Represents an individual message inside a chat session.

id.description: The unique ID for the message.

role.description: The sender type of the message.

text.description: The textual content of the message.

panel.description: Associated UI panel Type, if any.

isJcStep.description: Whether this message belongs to a Job Card setup step.

jcStepCode.description: Specific code identifier for the Job Card setup step.

/chat_sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{mes.description: Individual messages organized chronologically as a subcollection of the chat session.
